name: my-career-monorepo
description: Career portfolio monorepo with admin panel, public website, and backend API

scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @repo/validation build && pnpm --filter @repo/ui build && pnpm --filter @repo/graphql build
scripts.build:docker: pnpm schema:generate && pnpm build:packages && turbo run build --filter=backend --filter=admin --filter=website
scripts.check:all: pnpm run check:types && pnpm run check:lint
scripts.validation:rebuild: pnpm --filter @repo/validation exec rm -rf dist dist-cjs *.tsbuildinfo && pnpm --filter @repo/validation build
scripts.prisma:push: pnpm --filter backend exec prisma db push && pnpm --filter backend exec prisma db seed
scripts.prisma:migrate: pnpm --filter backend exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:seed: pnpm --filter backend exec prisma migrate dev && pnpm --filter backend exec prisma db seed
scripts.prisma:seed: pnpm --filter backend exec prisma db seed
scripts.prisma:reset: pnpm --filter backend exec prisma migrate reset --force  && pnpm --filter backend exec prisma db seed
scripts.pre-push: pnpm graphql:codegen && turbo run check-types lint
